name: Peaches&cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cans peach slices in juice, large can
recipeInstructions:
CREAM
8 ounces cream cheese
1/2 cup sugar
3 tablespoons juice from peaches
TOPPING
1 tablespoon sugar
1/2 teaspoon cinnamon
Preheat oven to 350°F. (Bake for 30-35 minutes)
1. Mix all ingredients above the word CREAM in a bowl. Beat for 2 minutes and pour into a well-oiled pie plate.
2. Drain the peaches and arrange on top of the batter.
3. Cream together all ingredients under CREAM and spoon on top of the fruit, within 1 inch of the edge of the pie plate.
4. Mix together the TOPPING items and sprinkle on top.
